description: Strength-model inputs for the teams still active in the FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout bracket. FIFA ranks and Elo ratings are source-backed (see per-team source URLs and as-of dates); World Cup history scores are derived demo values. Eliminated teams are intentionally absent — they remain in data/knockoutContext.json as completed results but are not modelled forward.

fifaRank.name: FIFA Men's World Ranking (official)
fifaRank.detail: Ranking release of 11 June 2026 (dateId id14870), retrieved from the inside.fifa.com ranking-overview data endpoint on 2026-07-06.

eloRating.name: World Football Elo Ratings
eloRating.detail: Current ratings as published at eloratings.net (World.tsv data file), retrieved 2026-07-06. Elo ratings are independent of FIFA and update after each match.

teams.name: France
teams.notes: Quarter-finalist (M97 vs Morocco). Two-time champion; history score is a hand-derived pedigree value, not from a documented source.

teams.name: Morocco
teams.notes: Quarter-finalist (M97 vs France). 2022 semi-finalist; history score is a hand-derived pedigree value.

teams.name: Norway
teams.notes: Quarter-finalist (M99 vs England). Sparse World Cup record before 2026; note the large gap between FIFA rank (31) and Elo (1972, top-10) — Elo credits recent form faster.

teams.name: England
teams.notes: Quarter-finalist (M99 vs Norway). 1966 champion; history score is a hand-derived pedigree value.

teams.name: Portugal
teams.notes: Round-of-16 (M93 vs Spain). History score is a hand-derived pedigree value.

teams.name: Spain
teams.notes: Round-of-16 (M93 vs Portugal). FIFA #1 and Elo #1 at retrieval time; 2010 champion. History score is a hand-derived pedigree value.

teams.name: United States
teams.notes: Round-of-16 (M94 vs Belgium). Listed as 'USA' in FIFA data and the bracket snapshot. History score is a hand-derived pedigree value.

teams.name: Belgium
teams.notes: Round-of-16 (M94 vs USA). 2018 third place; history score is a hand-derived pedigree value.

teams.name: Argentina
teams.notes: Round-of-16 (M95 vs Egypt). Defending champion; history score is a hand-derived pedigree value.

teams.name: Egypt
teams.notes: Round-of-16 (M95 vs Argentina). Few prior World Cup appearances; lowest FIFA rank and Elo in the active field. History score is a hand-derived pedigree value.

teams.name: Switzerland
teams.notes: Round-of-16 (M96 vs Colombia). Regular participant, repeated round-of-16 exits. History score is a hand-derived pedigree value.

teams.name: Colombia
teams.notes: Round-of-16 (M96 vs Switzerland). 2014 quarter-finalist; Elo #6 at retrieval time. History score is a hand-derived pedigree value.
